slots: Tiger sightings, wildlife safari, forest landscapes
Begin your Chandrapur adventure with an early morning safari through Maharashtra's oldest and most celebrated tiger reserve. Keep an eye out for tigers, leopards, sloth bears, and diverse birdlife.
Learn about the reserve's unique ecosystem, conservation efforts, and the incredible variety of flora and fauna that thrive within the forest.
Relax by the tranquil waters of Irai Lake and watch the landscape come alive with migratory birds and stunning sunset colours.
